consumption_attempt: External context attempts to treat an inspectable Fork record as establishing external admissibility, compliance, approval, legal sufficiency, acceptance, or authority.
required_next_action: Create a separate external-authority claim boundary contract or obtain an external authority decision before relying on admissibility, compliance, approval, legal sufficiency, acceptance, or execution eligibility.
fork_non_authority_statement: Fork does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, determine admissibility, establish legal sufficiency, decide acceptance, or judge correctness.
